reasoning: At -55.7%, the loss is valuation-driven, not fundamental. WIX's business is still healthy. The AI threat narrative is real but unresolved — WIX is fighting back with AI tools (Base 44 acquisition). At 0.4% weight, the position is immaterial enough to hold. Analyst PT $146 provides a clear upside anchor. Q1 2026 earnings (~May 2026) is the next decision point. ENTRY/EXIT CONDITIONS: Reassess at Q1 earnings. Add on pullback to $70. Exit if AI competition clearly erodes core user base.
exitConditions: Exit if AI competition clearly erodes core user base.

bullCase: WIX revenue still growing +13% to $1.99B. FCF $500M+ at 28% margin. Rule of 40 achieved. Analyst consensus $146 (79% upside from $81.95). Trading at ~10x trailing FCF — historically cheap.
bearCase: AI disruption fear (vibe-coding tools unbundling Wix's value prop). Multiple compression from 25-50x FCF to 10x. CEO conviction less clear than in prior cycles.
